```mjs title=main.mjs
import * as __rspack_external_fs from "fs";
// fs

// ./index.js



it("should keep namespace and named external imports aligned", () => {
  expect(__rspack_external_fs.readFile).toBe(__rspack_external_fs.readFile);
  expect(__rspack_external_fs.readFileSync).toBe(__rspack_external_fs.readFileSync);
});


```
